title: GMP Audit vs GDP Audit
alt: Side-by-side comparison of GMP and GDP audit scope, frameworks and roles

left.heading: GMP Audit
points: Covers how product is made and tested

right.heading: GDP Audit
points: Responsible Person (RP) controls the supply chain
Temperature mapping, cold-chain, returns and recalls
Applies under a Wholesale Dealer's Licence (WDA(H))
